name: graph_streaming_encode_distance_n_positional
description: Streaming graph encode spanning distance groups >= 3 (targets, distance_3 x2, distance_4). Pins that the trailer counts follow group-header emission order DETERMINISTICALLY (SPEC 8.4): counts=1,2,1,1 for targets=1, distance_3=2, distance_4=1, edges=1. Guards against non-deterministic map-order emission of distance_N groups. Pairs with 011 (identical input, labeled trailer). Runners that do not implement graph-stream-encode skip this fixture.
